name: Himalayan Pink Salted
description: Slow-roasted to crispy perfection and sprinkled with hand-harvested pink salt crystals and black pepper.

name: Wild Peri-Peri Spice
description: Tossed in African Bird's Eye chili pepper, smoked paprika, garlic, and citrus zest. A fiery, zesty treat!

name: Sour Cream & Onion
description: A delicious blend of rich tangy sour cream, fresh green chives, and savory onions for a classic crunch.

name: Caramel Sweet Crunch
description: Satisfy your sweet tooth with crisp makhana enveloped in a rich, buttery caramelized sugar glaze.
